race.comment: AQUAFOX (1) made progress last time out, finishing second over this track and trip. Rock-hard fit now and only needs to hold his form to be breaking through. REIBY PRINCESS (8) placed two back then turned in another solid effort last time out when fourth here. Great chance to break through. I'M A MILLENNIAL (2) finds it tough to break through but is knocking on the door. Was beaten less than a length here two back - a similar effort here puts her right in the finish again. OLD MATE BLUEY (4) turned in a nice run when fresh from a spell two starts back at Clare. Less effective last time but is fitter so don't underestimate. IT'S A SOLID DEEL (3) is capable of better than his last two suggests. Expect him to head straight back from the wide draw and be saved for the final shot at them.
